summary: Iteration 149: SEC-001/SEC-002 Rollout APIs, Sandbox Dashboard Visualization, Admin Guard, and KPI Correlation - All 21 backend tests passed, frontend components verified.

issues: Minor: Recharts console warning about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: SEC-001 Secrets Management APIs correctly return health, config, audit stats, rotation plan with severity levels, and tenant/provider scoping
SEC-002 Crypto Migration APIs correctly return dual-read/write status, cutover metrics with format distribution, dry-run migration check, and key versioning with rotation/rollback plans
Sandbox Dashboard APIs return provider cards with pass/fail data, trend data for charting, regression detection, and deploy/drift correlation
Admin Guard correctly protects all /api/ops/* endpoints - returns 401 without token, accepts valid Bearer tokens
KPI Correlation API correctly maps alerts to business impact (revenue_risk, rate_parity_risk, security_risk, data_protection_risk)
Frontend SandboxDashboard and SecurityOpsDashboard components load correctly on /control-plane route

All data-testid attributes present for testing: sandbox-dashboard, security-ops-dashboard, secrets-health-card, crypto-status-card, crypto-cutover-card, rotation-plan-card, sandbox-provider-card-*, sandbox-trend-chart, sandbox-correlation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 149 verified SEC-001/SEC-002 rollout APIs, Sandbox Dashboard visualization, Admin Guard, and KPI Correlation. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/ops/secrets/status, GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation-plan, GET /api/ops/secrets/scoping, GET /api/ops/crypto/status, GET /api/ops/crypto/cutover-metrics, POST /api/ops/crypto/migrate-check, GET /api/ops/crypto/key-info, GET /api/ops/sandbox/dashboard, GET /api/ops/sandbox/trends, GET /api/ops/sandbox/regressions, GET /api/ops/sandbox/correlation, GET /api/ops/alerts/kpi-correlation. All /api/ops/* endpoints require Bearer token auth. Frontend control plane at /control-plane shows SandboxDashboard and SecurityOpsDashboard components.

admin_guard.notes: All /api/ops/* endpoints return 401 without token, accept valid Bearer tokens

GET /api/ops/secrets/status.notes: Returns health, config (provider, environment, legacy_fallback, audit_enabled), audit_24h stats, anomalies_24h

GET /api/ops/secrets/rotation-plan.notes: Returns items with severity (info/warning/critical), recommendation (OK/ROTATE_RECOMMENDED/ROTATE_URGENT), summary, rotation_policy

GET /api/ops/secrets/scoping.notes: Returns scoping array, isolation_model=tenant/provider/property, cross_tenant_access=DENIED, policy_enforcement=active

GET /api/ops/crypto/status.notes: Returns health, config (v2_enabled, bypass_allowed, key_version, has_master_key), dual_read_write (status, write_format, read_formats), fallback_strategy

GET /api/ops/crypto/cutover-metrics.notes: Returns collections breakdown, totals (syr1, aes_gcm_legacy, other_legacy), cutover (migration_percentage, cutover_ready, recommended_action)

POST /api/ops/crypto/migrate-check.notes: Returns dry_run=true, would_migrate count, already_current count, total_scanned, action recommendation

GET /api/ops/crypto/key-info.notes: Returns current_version, has_current_key, has_previous_key, rotation_ready, rotation_steps array, rollback_plan (immediate, break_glass, key_rollback)

GET /api/ops/sandbox/dashboard.notes: Returns has_data, provider_cards with pass/fail/total/pass_rate/scenarios, last_run info, label=sandbox_pass

GET /api/ops/sandbox/trends.notes: Returns overall_trend, provider_trends, scenario_trends, most_failing_scenarios, total_runs

GET /api/ops/sandbox/regressions.notes: Returns has_regression, regressions array with provider/scenario/severity/runbook_link/alert_type, label=sandbox_regression

GET /api/ops/alerts/kpi-correlation.notes: Returns kpi_impact (revenue_risk, rate_parity_risk, security_risk, data_protection_risk with level/alert_count/drivers), alert_summary (total_alerts, by_severity, by_provider, time_window_hours)

SandboxDashboard.notes: Component loads on /control-plane, shows provider cards (HotelRunner 100%, Exely 100%), trend chart, most failing scenarios, deploy/drift correlation

SecurityOpsDashboard.notes: Component loads on /control-plane, shows SEC-001 Secrets Health Card (SAGLIKLI, local_dev provider), SEC-002 Crypto Engine Card (V1 LEGACY, aes256gcm write format), Migration Cutover (0%), Rotation Plan

test_classes: TestSEC001SecretsManagement (3 tests) - Secrets status, rotation plan, scoping
TestSEC002CryptoMigration (4 tests) - Crypto status, cutover metrics, migrate check, key info
TestSandboxDashboard (4 tests) - Dashboard, trends, regressions, correlation
TestAuthenticatedAccess (4 tests) - Verifies endpoints work with auth

mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints are backed by real MongoDB queries and real simulation data.
